nasb.text: For they have fled from the swords, From the drawn sword, and from the bent bow And from the press of battle.

esv.text: For they have fled from the swords, from the drawn sword, from the bent bow, and from the press of battle.

cnv.text: 因為他們逃避了刀劍、 已出鞘的刀劍和上了弦的弓， 以及嚴重的戰禍。

ccb.text: 他们从敌人的刀光箭影中逃生。

csbs.text: 因为他们逃脱了刀剑之灾—— 出鞘的刀、拉开的弓和战争的重压。
